hero.title: Training Facilities
hero.description: The first German program is hosted in partnership with WERK in Bremerhaven and Kulturmarkthalle in Berlin. These community-focused facilities offer a central and accessible location, ideal for hands-on installation training.

facility.title: KulturMarktHalle Berlin
facility.subtitle: Hosted by WERK, at the heart of Germany's renewable energy hub

partners.title: Project Facilitators
partners.subtitle: Working together to deliver world-class solar training

futureLocations.title: Interested in being a trainer?
futureLocations.description: Contact us if you have at least 2 years installation experience and are able to dedicate a week to training future coherts at one of our partner facilities.
futureLocations.description2: Check back soon for updates on this and other new locations.
